gist.headline: The garden gets organized
gist.blurb: We've sorted over 500 apps into 15 fresh categories. From Vibe Coding to AI Studios, it's now much easier to see what's growing in the ecosystem.
gist.summary: Recategorized 542 ecosystem apps into 15 specific domains and added a new economics dashboard to track category performance.
gist.impact: Users will find apps more easily with granular categories like 'Vibe Coding' and 'AI Studio', while we get better visibility into ecosystem health.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the Bee and the Robot organizing a chaotic pile of glowing seeds into 15 neat, labeled garden planters. The Robot is holding a clipboard with a chart, representing the new economics dashboard. The scene represents the transition from a general list to structured categories.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the Bee and the Robot sorting glowing seeds into 15 neat wooden garden planters. The Robot holds a clipboard showing a lime green (#ecf874) chart. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, organized garden shed vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
